name: Pork Chops with Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim excess fat from pork chops.
2. Brown pork chops in a hot frying pan. Remove the chops and discard the fat.
3. Cook celery and onion in the frying pan until tender. Mix with bread, apple, seasonings, and 2 tablespoons water.
4. Place pork chops back in the frying pan. Top each chop with half of the stuffing mixture.
5. Add 1/4 cup water to the frying pan. Cover and cook over low heat until pork chops are tender—about 30 minutes. Check the pork chops during cooking; add a small amount of water if needed to prevent over-browning.
